Episodes.Title: The One After Joey and Rachel Kiss
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Andrew Reich
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Joey and Ross both attempt to come clean to each other that they're dating Rachel and Charlie. Phoebe finds out Mike has another girlfriend.

Episodes.Title: The One Where Ross Is Fine
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Sherry Bilsing
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Rachel and Joey fear for Ross's state of mind after he finds out about their relationship. Chandler and Monica visit some friends of Phoebe to get advice on adoption. Frank and the triplets come to visit.

Episodes.Title: The One with Ross's Tan
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Brian Buckner
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Ross goes to a tanning salon but fails to follow the 'simple' instructions. Joey and Rachel struggle to make the transition from friends to lovers. Monica and Phoebe try to avoid an annoying woman that used to live in their building.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Cake
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Robert Carlock
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: On Emma's first birthday, Ross and Rachel convince everyone to delay their plans so they can attend her party, however plans go awry when Emma's birthday cake is revealed.

Episodes.Title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Babysits
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Dana Klein
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Rachel's sister Amy comes to visit and moves in with her and Joey. Phoebe constantly and accidentally ruins Mike's proposals. Joey struggles to write a letter of recommendation for Monica and Chandler's adoption agency.

Episodes.Title: The One with Ross' Grant
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Sebastian Jones
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Ross applies for a paleontology grant and finds out Charlie's ex-boyfriend reviews the applications. Monica and Rachel fight over who has to take Phoebe's ugly painting.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Home Study
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Mark Kunerth
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Monica and Chandler nervously prepare for a visit from an adoption worker. Phoebe and Mike keep changing their minds about donating their wedding money to charity. Ross fights Rachel's fear of swings.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Late Thanksgiving
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Shana Goldberg-Meehan
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Joey, Ross, Rachel and Phoebe convince Monica and Chandler to host Thanksgiving, however the four of them end up arriving to dinner an hour late.

Episodes.Title: The One with the Birth Mother
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Scott Silveri
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Nervous and excited, Monica and Chandler travel to Ohio to meet a young pregnant woman, Erica Simmons, who is considering allowing them to adopt her child when it's born.

Episodes.Title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Doty Abrams
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Monica & Chandler look at real estate outside the city which leads to the rest of the gang reminiscing on all their memories of the apartment.

Episodes.Title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Old secrets come to light when Ross and Chandler attend a college reunion. Monica and Rachel throw Phoebe a bachelorette party. Joey appears as a celebrity partner on a game show.

Episodes.Title: The One with Phoebe's Wedding
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Robert Carlock
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Chaos ensues as Phoebe and Mike prepare to get married.

Episodes.Title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Sherry Bilsing
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Phoebe tries to teach Joey to speak French for an audition; Ross and Rachel head out to Long Island after her dad has a heart attack.

Episodes.Title: The One with Princess Consuela
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Tracy Reilly
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Phoebe ponders whether or not to changer her name. Monica & Chandler take Joey to visit the new house. Ross & Rachel set their eyes on their career profession.

Episodes.Title: The One Where Estelle Dies
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Mark Kunerth
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Ross tries to get Rachel to go back to Ralph Lauren, Joey doesn't know that his agent has died, and Monica and Chandler bump into Janice.

Episodes.Title: The One with Rachel's Going Away Party
Episodes.Writer: David Crane, Marta Kauffman, Andrew Reich
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: The gang throws Rachel a goodbye party, during which she says goodbye to everybody individually.

Episodes.Title: The Last One: Part 1
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow
Episodes.Plot: Phoebe races Ross to the airport in a bid to stop Rachel from leaving for Paris. Monica and Chandler pack up their apartment ahead of their move to their new house, and Joey buys Chandler a new chick and duck as a leaving present.

Episodes.Title: The Last One: Part 2
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Vincent Boyle, Anthony Cistaro
Episodes.Plot: The six friends prepare to say goodbye and embark on the next chapters of their lives; momentous events and last-minute surprises.

Episodes.Title: The One with All the Other Ones: Part 2
Episodes.Writer: David Crane (created by), David Crane (creator), Marta Kauffman (created by), Marta Kauffman (creator), Marta Kauffman (teleplay), David Crane
Episodes.Actors: Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc
Episodes.Plot: A collection of clips from past episodes, past seasons, leading to the final episode.
